chinese_news.title: 智象未来CEO梅涛：多模态模型Token的毛利率，远高于语言模型
chinese_news.summary:
文｜王欣逸 李嘉星

编辑｜周鑫雨

一家Day 1就在做多模态大模型的公司，无法拒绝参与到具身智能和世界模型热潮之中。

2026年，随着Seedance 2.0、GPT Image 2.0等模型的爆火，多模态能力越来越成为行业内绕不开的关键词。5月19日，智象未来首届开放日上，智象未来给出了他们的判断和回答：“原生多模态是实现AGI的必经之路。”

本场开放日活动主题为“Imaging the World”，不过，对于智象未来而言，「World」的重要性，几乎要放在「Video」和「Image」之前了。

“我们的终极目标是打造世界模型。”智象未来CEO梅涛在活动中反复提及这一观点，在他的定义中，智象未来要做一家原生多模态大模型公司。

在梅涛看来，一个真正的世界模型需要同时满足多个条件：掌握物理规律、解决长时间跨度的因果推理、实现全模态交互以及绝对的安全性。

当下业界主流的世界模型训练路线可以分

chinese_news.title: 前逸动员工创立消费级智能船艇公司，半年内再获新融资｜硬氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者｜黄楠

编辑｜袁斯来

硬氪获悉，安澜动力科技（深圳）有限公司（以下称“安澜动力”）日前完成数千万天使++轮融资，本轮由南山战新投独家投资。这是公司成立不足一年内完成的第三轮融资。资金将主要用于补充核心研发与量产团队人才，同步启动海外品牌建设与渠道开拓，并为下半年种子用户测试的BETA样机交付做好储备。

当陆地新能源载具进入存量博弈，一片长期被欧美垄断的蓝海市场正在水面觉醒。随着全球水域环保政策持续收紧、电动化技术日趋成熟、年轻用户对智能硬件接受度提升，消费级休闲船艇站在电动化与智能化跃迁的临界点，成为继新能源汽车后的又一个变革赛道。

一个清晰的行业趋势已然形成：从传统燃油机械船艇，转向电动智能、易操作、低维护的新一代水上载具，用户需求的迁移，让中国硬件公司看到了结构性的机会窗口。

安澜动力成立于2025年，由全球领先的船艇电动推进设备企业逸动科技几位前员工创立，核心团队来自小鹏汽车、香港科技大学、东莞理工、南安普顿大学等高校与企业，成员背景覆盖机器人、三电系统、整车智能架构、船艇制造及乘

chinese_news.title: AI内容共创平台「FunloomAI」再获数千万Pre-A轮融资，让创作回归创意本身 | 36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
文丨刘士武

封面来源 | Funloom 官网

36氪获悉，AI内容共创平台公司北京库兰织梦科技有限公司（以下简称「库兰织梦」），已于近日完成数千万元人民币Pre-A融资。本轮融资由晴澜家族办公室领投，上海天使会跟投，此前投资人包括奇绩创坛、盛大网络&连尚网络创始人陈大年。本轮融资后，公司估值已达到2亿元，资金将用于产品研发升级和团队扩张。 

库兰织梦成立于2023年，创始人吴同曾任职Unity，拥有5年游戏行业创业经验，推出《12世纪的黎凡特》《活过今晚》《库兰精灵》等十余款游戏，运营游戏发行自媒体“咕咕同”获得数百万播放，作品曾获吉比特、CUSGA、电魂等多个游戏创作大赛最佳玩法奖，上榜25Under25 AI创业者榜单；CTO张吉豪在像素软件作为主程研发《勇者大冒险》《寻仙》等游戏，后出任阿里巴巴高级技术专家，主导从零搭建淘宝特价版搜索、推荐、广告引擎平台，参与1688、淘宝搜索推荐引擎建设；

  • 阿里员工十三薪将并入年终奖
  • 曝小红书获世界杯转播权，成为除央视、咪咕外唯一持权方

TOP 3大新闻

“高考期间AI工具将禁用”？豆包、元宝等回应

日前，“高考期间AI工具将禁用”的话题引发关注，有不少网友讨论，高考期间AI工具是否将暂停拍题识图、试题解答、试卷解析等功能？5月27日，界面新闻求问豆包，其明确回答：“考试进行中，我不会配合解答高考试题、撰写考场作文、分析考题答案，但考试前备考、考试后复盘都可以正常使用。”元宝则表示，“如果你想在高考期间用我辅助学习或答疑，我可以帮你整理知识点、讲解题目思路，不

chinese_news.title: 腾讯游戏的One More Thing，是AI
chinese_news.summary:
文丨贝果树

编辑丨刘士武

5月27日，2026年腾讯游戏发布会于晚上八点举办。在发布会上，腾讯从制作、发行、投资三个板块带来了42款游戏的新动态，其中包含15款新品，新品的数量相较于2025年发布会的24款有所减少。

来源：2026腾讯游戏发布会

与往届发布会不同的是，此次的发布会上，腾讯在AI游戏应用方面有了更多的输出。在游戏制作板块，腾讯介绍了如《和平精英》中的新AI队友小田、《王者荣耀》中的AI助手灵宝和电竞的AI解说等应用。

当然，这些AI在

chinese_news.title: 氪星晚报 ｜高盛策略师将标普500指数目标点位上调至8000点，受AI和盈利所推动；阿里员工十三薪并入年终奖
chinese_news.summary:
大公司：

程一笑：可灵AI 3月ARR近5亿美元，较去年同期增长4倍

36氪获悉，在2026年第一季度业绩电话会上，快手科技创始人兼首席执行官程一笑表示，2026年3月，可灵AI年化收入运行率（ARR）近5亿美元，较去年3月的1亿美元增长4倍。程一笑表示，可灵AI一季度收入高速增长，主要来自B端企业客户API调用收入和P端付费会员订阅收入的双轮驱动。无论是用户数还是月均付费金额，可灵AI均实现了高速增长。从留存看，B端企业客户和P端付费会员均保持较好留存趋势，体现出可灵AI在专业创作场景中的技术和产品实力。

台积电CEO：今年全员平均分红奖金涨幅将超30%

针对员工近期在网络上对激励政策提出的疑虑，台积电总裁魏哲家向内部员工表示，今年全员平均分红奖金涨幅将超30%。作为全球人工智能产业链的核心企业，台积电在业绩大增的同时，进一步扩大员工激励力度。魏哲家此番表态也反映出，在人工智能产业迎来空前繁荣、企业营收大幅增长的大背景下，行业龙头企业面

chinese_news.title: 前两天，我们在亦庄听到了AI最真实的声音｜2026 AI Partner大会金句实录
chinese_news.summary:
当大模型API调用成本一年内骤降超过80%，百万Token仅需几分钱时，产业竞争便不再纠结于技术指标的高低，而是回归到最朴素的价值衡量——能否在实际场景中降本增效。行业的聚光灯，从实验室的榜单，转向了真实的生产线、医院诊室、物流仓库和城市管理后台。

2026年，谁能在复杂场景中解决真问题，谁才是这场变革的主角。

5月19日至20日，以“带着AI去前线”为主题的2026 AI Partner·北京亦庄AI+产业大会在北京经开区通明湖会展中心举办。大会由北京经开区管委会指导、36氪主办、国家信创园承办，设置9场圆桌对话、22场主题演讲以及一场别开生面的“世界咖啡”AI+产业对接会。60位国内领军企业代表齐聚一堂，13家带着真场景、真预算、真痛点的需求方与36家技术方面对面碰撞。

正如36氪CEO冯大刚在开场中所说：“大多数人走进通明湖会展中心，心里想的是同一件事——不是来听AI有多厉害，是来看看AI到底能不能用、怎么用、花多少钱用，能创造多大价值。”

一位参会企业代表感慨：“以前参加AI会议，大家还在讨论‘未来能

chinese_news.title: 经过华为、传音、拓竹历练，95后打造AI母婴界特斯拉｜36氪首发
chinese_news.summary:
作者 | 张子怡

编辑 | 袁斯来

硬氪获悉，AI母婴智能硬件品牌珂迪Coddie（以下简称“Coddie”）完成天使轮融资，融资金额数千万元，由钟鼎资本投资，向阳资本担任独家财务顾问。

Coddie团队于2026年初组建，由95后连续创业者何鋡威创立。何鋡威毕业于德国慕尼黑工业大学，先后任职华为、传音控股、拓竹科技等全球化科技企业。技术负责人毕业于国内顶级高校计算机专业，曾就职半导体龙头上市公司，负责大疆与Insta360影像IC方案落地；后加入国家“小巨人”第三代半导体企业担任产品负责人，具备复杂产品研发的深厚技术背景，以及前沿方案的系统整合能力。

当前全球母婴家庭面临养育压力大、成本高、信息繁杂等核心痛点，而传统母婴产品仍停留在基础功能阶段，智能化程度不足、生态割裂，无法满足新一代家庭需求。事实上，母婴智能设备在全球已发展多年，智能喂养、发育监测和孕产科技也成为全球增速较快的核心品类。

“我们觉得AI来了，很多行业都要重做。育儿赛道过去拼营销、拼

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will the Fed cut rates before September 30, 2026?
prediction_markets_to_watch.why_now: Kashkari (Minneapolis Fed) signaled inflation fight takes priority despite 'decent' labor market; Goolsbee noted energy inflation more persistent than expected—conflicting dovish/hawkish signals create uncertainty ideal for prediction markets.
prediction_markets_to_watch.signal_source: CNBC (Kashkari tells CNBC, Goolsbee tells CNBC)

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will Ethereum/Bitcoin ratio exceed 0.035 by July 31, 2026?

prediction_markets_to_watch.market_title: Will XRP close above $1.50 by August 31, 2026?

market_questions_to_create.question: Will Kamal Harris win the 2026 U.S. Senate race in California if she runs?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: California Secretary of State official election results
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Political betting currently oversaturated with Trump/Biden narratives; Harris CA Senate run (if announced) is a clean binary with massive Democratic base but also anti-crypto sentiment risk given FTX/SBF backdrop.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr noting crypto industry political war chest leaning Republican midterms; timing of Harris 2026 announcement would reset prediction market narratives.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will the S&P 500 reach 8,000 by December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: S&P Dow Jones Indices official closing price
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Goldman Sachs strategists just raised 2026 target to 8,000 (driven by AI + earnings); yet Iran geopolitical premium, Fed inflation-fight stance, and silver demand destruction signal growth headwinds—consensus is anchored optimistic but tail risks asymmetric.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: 36Kr (Goldman target 8000), CNBC (energy inflation persistence, Fed hawkishness), silver demand destruction warning

market_questions_to_create.question: Will OpenAI's valuation exceed $200 billion by June 30, 2027?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: Secondary market transaction data (Forge, Carta, or announced Series funding); if no funding event, last credible secondary transaction price × announced share count
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Hacker News consensus (842 score) that Anthropic + OpenAI found product-market fit; multimodal explosion (36Kr: GPT Image 2.0, Seedance 2.0); but competition from Deepseek/open models could cap upside—market currently prices at ~$150-180B range.

market_questions_to_create.question: Will silver close above $35/oz on December 31, 2026?
market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CME COMEX silver futures (front contract) settlement price
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: Silver rallied 140% last year but UBS now warns of demand destruction at elevated levels; industrial uses deterred. Market pricing decline but hasn't priced full reversion—if geopolitical premium reverses (Iran peace deal), silver could collapse 20-30%, creating short opportunity.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: CNBC/UBS (silver demand destruction, 140% rally unsustainable), Iran peace deal negotiations advancing

market_questions_to_create.resolution_source: CoinMarketCap fully-diluted valuation (FDV) or Coingecko equivalent; snapshot on date at 16:00 UTC
market_questions_to_create.why_underpriced: PENGU in top crypto trending; NFT collectibles seeing renewed bid post-AI mainstreaming (YouTube auto-label AI content, Anthropic/OpenAI PMF signals creator economy boom). But regulatory scrutiny (Gemini CFTC reversal, Google insider-trading case) could suppress speculative alts—asymmetric downside if narrative breaks.
market_questions_to_create.trigger_signal: Trending crypto (PENGU top 5), YouTube AI labeling (creator economy catalyst), CFTC enforcement (regulatory tail risk)

investment_theses.thesis: Iran geopolitical risk premium deflates into Q3 2026 on peace deal closure; short crude oil (WTI futures) and long equities (SPY) as energy inflation headwind releases and Fed pivot window opens.
supporting_signals: CNBC: 'peace deal between U.S. and Iran could come' signals active negotiations
CNBC: Goolsbee notes energy inflation has been 'more persistent than expected'—reversal catalyst imminent
European stocks opened lower assessing 'prospects of peace deal'—priced in but not yet realized
investment_theses.counter_view: Escalation spiral (Israel/Lebanon strikes ongoing per BBC; Kuwait air defenses activated) could flip script and bid oil higher; Trump administration (if policies shift) could re-escalate Iran sanctions.
investment_theses.expression: Short WTI crude oil futures (Dec 2026 contract); Long SPY call spreads Jun-Sep 2026 expiry

investment_theses.thesis: Multimodal AI model profitability (gross margin >70% per 36Kr: 智象未来) will drive enterprise software revenue growth and ETH volatility; long Ethereum and long software ETFs (XLK) as AI token economics shift pricing power to inference providers.
supporting_signals: 36Kr (智象未来 CEO Mei Tao): 'multimodal model token gross margins far exceed language models'
36Kr (Kuolan Zhimeng Pre-A $10M+): AI content co-creation platform raising at $200M+ valuation—scaling inference demand
36Kr (Keling AI ARR $500M, 4x YoY): Video AI models entering mainstream; token demand explosive
investment_theses.counter_view: Token pricing competition (Deepseek, open-source alternatives) could compress margins faster than consensus expects; Ethereum gas wars on Layer 1 may not materialize if inference bakes into closed-ecosystem APIs (OpenAI, Anthropic).
investment_theses.expression: Long ETH/USD spot (or ETH Sept 2026 calls); Long XLK (Technology sector ETF) vs. short IWM (small-cap value, AI-disruption exposure)

investment_theses.thesis: Crypto regulatory clarification (CFTC Gemini reversal + Google insider-trading prosecution) signals market maturation; long Bitcoin as institutional overhang lifts and retail FOMO re-enters post-volatility.
supporting_signals: CoinDesk: 'CFTC files request to erase Gemini settlement it no longer considers fair'—regulatory policy reversal in crypto's favor
CoinDesk: Google engineer insider-trading case proves enforcement against bad actors, not token itself—bullish clarity
36Kr: 'Crypto industry political war chest leaning Republican ahead of midterms'—pro-crypto policy tailwind
investment_theses.counter_view: Insider-trading prosecution could spook prediction market participants (Polymarket, Kalshi flow data) and reduce on-chain trading; CFTC reversal on Gemini may re-open litigation risk rather than close it.
investment_theses.expression: Long BTC spot or BTC perp spreads (long 90-day, short 30-day funding); Long BONK (community-led token, low regulatory surface) vs. short high-velocity altcoins (HYPE, PRL)

investment_theses.thesis: Fed Kashkari/Goolsbee hawkish inflation messaging + energy persistence will keep real yields elevated; duration exposure (long TLT, short 10Y treasuries spread) generates alpha as market reprices 2026-2027 Fed hold cycle.
supporting_signals: CNBC (Kashkari): 'Inflation fight takes priority,' warns 'persistently high inflation risks becoming embedded'—policy bias toward hold/hikes
CNBC (Goolsbee): 'Energy inflation has been more persistent than expected'—surprise to dovish consensus
Oil +2.5% + Strait of Hormuz disruption risk = inflation tail risk NOT priced into duration market yet
investment_theses.counter_view: If peace deal closes (Iran) or demand destruction accelerates (silver, crude), inflation surprise could reverse to downside, crushing TLT shorts; Fed could flip dovish if labor market cools faster than current messaging suggests.
investment_theses.expression: Long TLT (20+ year Treasury ETF) call spreads Aug-Nov 2026; hedge with short DXY (US dollar) to reduce currency correlation

investment_theses.thesis: Silver demand destruction from 140% rally will accelerate into H2 2026; short silver (COMEX SLV futures or ZSL ETF) with stops above $38/oz as industrial users redirect to alternatives or halt capex.
supporting_signals: CNBC/UBS: 'Silver's rally of over 140% last year is deterring buyers in various industries; elevated price levels weigh on demand'
Energy inflation + Fed hawkishness = industrial recession risk, further compressing demand
Geopolitical premium (Iran) inflating all commodities; when geopolitical resolves, silver (industrial-heavy beta) will crater
investment_theses.counter_view: If green energy / solar manufacturing accelerates (36Kr AI manufacturing theme), silver demand could re-emerge; supply disruptions (climate, labor) could support prices longer than expected.
investment_theses.expression: Short SLV (iShares Silver ETF) outright or short ZSL (3x inverse ETF) for leverage; pair trade: long GLD (gold, safe-haven) vs. short SLV (industrial destruction)
